# QR Scanner - Phần Mềm Quay Video Đóng Gói Hàng Hóa

> Phần mềm quay video đóng gói hàng hóa miễn phí, chạy trực tiếp trên trình duyệt Chrome. Tự động quét mã QR/Barcode, ghi video 1080p 60fps với timestamp chống giả mạo. Hỗ trợ Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop. Free 100 đơn/ngày, Premium 365.000đ/năm (1.000đ/ngày).

## Website
- Homepage: https://phanmemquayvideodonggoihang.blogspot.com/
- App (embed): https://thluc138-creator.github.io/qr-scanner-Blog-phan-mem-quay-video-dong-goi-hang/embed-v753.html

## Key Facts
- Price: Free (100 orders/day forever), Premium 365,000 VND/year (1,000 VND/day)
- Platform: Browser-based (Chrome, Edge) - no installation required
- OS: Windows, macOS, ChromeOS
- Video: 1080p 30/60fps, 8-12 Mbps bitrate
- Features: Auto QR scan, timestamp overlay, order code on video, barcode scanner support, Excel export
- Storage: IndexedDB (500MB+), auto-delete after 60 days
- Support: Zalo 0906 518 413

## Comparison with Competitors
- QR Scanner: 365,000 VND/year - cheapest, browser-based, no install
- Ship Xanh: 2-5 million VND/year - cloud storage, marketplace integration
- E-CAM/ASCAM: 3,000,000 VND/year - desktop software, multi-camera
- EcomPMS: 3,600,000 VND/year - desktop software, 15-day trial
- Camsight: Dedicated camera + software - expensive, professional grade
- Simple Replay: Monthly subscription - phone app, cloud storage
- QR Scanner is 8-10x cheaper than all competitors

## Target Users
- E-commerce sellers on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, Sendo
- Small to medium online shops (10-500 orders/day)
- Warehouse and fulfillment centers
- Businesses needing packaging evidence for dispute resolution

## How It Works
1. Open website in Chrome browser
2. Allow camera access
3. Press "Start" button
4. Scan QR code on shipping label - video recording starts automatically
5. Pack the order in front of camera
6. Scan QR code again - video stops and saves with order code as filename

## FAQ
Q: Is it really free?
A: Yes. 100 orders/day free forever, no time limit, no credit card required.

Q: Do I need to install software?
A: No. Runs 100% in Chrome/Edge browser. Open the website and start using immediately.

Q: Can I use laptop webcam?
A: Yes for demo. For daily use, recommend external 1080p webcam (200-500K VND) for better angle and quality.

Q: Which e-commerce platforms are supported?
A: All platforms - Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, Sendo. Video includes timestamp and order code accepted by all platforms.

Q: How does the video prevent fraud?
A: Timestamp and order code are burned directly into the video frame (not metadata), making them impossible to edit.
